title: Egyptian Skillet Delight
description: A flavorful and savory dish that combines the tanginess of piquant and fermented ingredients with the crunch of prosciutto. Perfect for a quick and easy dinner.
instructions: Preheat the skillet over medium-high heat.
Cook the prosciutto slices for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until crispy.
Remove the prosciutto from the skillet and set aside.
Add the fermented Egyptian skillet sauce to the skillet and stir to combine with any remaining prosciutto drippings.
Add the piquant peppers to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until tender.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Return the prosciutto to the skillet and stir to combine with the peppers and sauce.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro if desired.
